MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Continued To Sep-30-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS PIMENTO, INC, DAN MYRIAD HOSPITALITY CORP, MYRIAD RESTAURANT GROUP, INC, PIMENTO INVESTORS, AND MYRIAD RESTAURANT GROUP'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to September 30, 2008. Movants are corporate entities and on July 2, 2008, their lawyers withdrew. Movants to obtain new counsel because a corporation cannot represent itself in pro per. See Merco Const. Engineers v. Muni Crt., (1978) 21 Cal.3D. 724. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
